signals.headline: Safety attention may lag capability: Multi-Agent / Tool-Use Capability vs Scalable Oversight
signals.detail: Multi-Agent / Tool-Use Capability velocity grew 21% recently while paired safety topic Scalable Oversight grew -6% (gap 26 pts); capability now runs ~0.2x the safety volume.

brief:
# Signal-Lag Foresight Brief

_Generated 2026-06-28 · 10304 papers · embedding backend: sentence-transformers_

## BLUF

- **Safety attention may lag capability: Multi-Agent / Tool-Use Capability vs Scalable Oversight** — Multi-Agent / Tool-Use Capability velocity grew 21% recently while paired safety topic Scalable Oversight grew -6% (gap 26 pts); capability now runs ~0.2x the safety volume.

## Capability vs. Safety Divergence

- **Safety attention may lag capability: Multi-Agent / Tool-Use Capability vs Scalable Oversight** (high): Multi-Agent / Tool-Use Capability velocity grew 21% recently while paired safety topic Scalable Oversight grew -6% (gap 26 pts); capability now runs ~0.2x the safety volume.

## Topic Velocity

- **Agentic / Autonomy Capability is accelerating** (medium): Submission rate inflected +39% (now ~115.0/quarter).
- **Chain-of-Thought Faithfulness is accelerating** (medium): Submission rate inflected +35% (now ~29.0/quarter).

lab_activity.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
lab_activity.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.

lab_activity.title: Understanding the brain with AI-driven explanations and experiments
lab_activity.summary:
Researchers introduce generative causal testing, which translates black box models into clear hypotheses and verifies them in the scanner, revealing what specific brain regions respond to in language.
The post Understanding the brain with AI-driven explanations and experiments appeared first on Microsoft Research.

lab_activity.title: How agents are transforming work
lab_activity.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.

lab_activity.title: Talos: Scaling rare disease diagnosis with automated, iterative genomic reanalysis
lab_activity.summary:
Talos was built to help resolve a major bottleneck in genomic medicine: human review time. The open-source system recovered 90% of in-scope diagnoses while surfacing just 1.3 candidate variants per patient for expert review. 
The post Talos: Scaling rare disease diagnosis with automated, iterative genomic reanalysis appeared first on Microsoft Research.

lab_activity.title: Introducing computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash
OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
lab_activity.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

lab_activity.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
lab_activity.summary: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.

lab_activity.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
lab_activity.summary: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

lab_activity.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
lab_activity.summary: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.

lab_activity.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
lab_activity.summary: Learn how Jason Liu uses Codex to preserve context, manage complex projects, and help work continue beyond a single prompt.

lab_activity.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
lab_activity.summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.

lab_activity.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
lab_activity.summary: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

lab_activity.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
lab_activity.summary: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.

lab_activity.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
lab_activity.summary: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.

lab_activity.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
lab_activity.summary: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.

lab_activity.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
lab_activity.summary: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.

lab_activity.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
lab_activity.summary: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.

lab_activity.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
lab_activity.summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.

lab_activity.title: Securing the future of AI agents
lab_activity.summary: Securing internal systems with an AI Control Roadmap, combining traditional safeguards and real-time monitoring.

lab_activity.title: Unlocking UK house-building with AI-accelerated planning
lab_activity.summary: UK government partners with Google DeepMind to build a new AI-powered prototype aimed at faster housing decisions.

lab_activity.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
lab_activity.summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

lab_activity.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
lab_activity.summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.

lab_activity.title: Ire identifies another LOTUSLITE specimen
lab_activity.summary:
Project Ire examined a timely malware sample and determined its intent through reverse engineering—identifying LOTUSLITE characteristics even as most major EDR tools did not detect it.
The post Ire identifies another LOTUSLITE specimen appeared first on Microsoft Research.

lab_activity.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
lab_activity.summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.

lab_activity.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
lab_activity.summary: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.

lab_activity.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
lab_activity.summary: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.

lab_activity.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
lab_activity.summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.

lab_activity.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
lab_activity.summary: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.

lab_activity.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
lab_activity.summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.

lab_activity.title: Investing in multi-agent AI safety research
lab_activity.summary: Google DeepMind and partners announce a $10M funding call for multi-agent safety research.

lab_activity.title: DiffusionGemma: 4x faster text generation
From data to decisions: how LSEG is scaling trusted AI
lab_activity.summary: See how LSEG uses OpenAI to scale trusted AI across its global business, accelerating insights, shrinking release cycles, and empowering 4,000 employees.

lab_activity.title: PRC-linked influence operations are targeting AI debates in the US
lab_activity.summary: A new report from OpenAI details PRC-linked influence operations using AI to target U.S. tech debates, data center narratives, tariffs, and false claims  about ChatGPT.

lab_activity.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
lab_activity.summary: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.

lab_activity.title: Powering the future of robotics in Europe
Introducing Gemma 4 12B: a unified, encoder-free multimodal model
Fluid, natural voice translation with Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
lab_activity.summary: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate brings near real-time, natural speech translation to Google AI Studio, Google Translate and Google Meet.

lab_activity.title: Industrial policy for the Intelligence Age
lab_activity.summary: Explore our ambitious, people-first industrial policy ideas for the AI era—focused on expanding opportunity, sharing prosperity, and building resilient institutions as advanced intelligence evolves.

lab_activity.title: What Codex unlocks for Notion
lab_activity.summary: How Notion uses Codex to one-shot specs, build AI Voice Input for the web, and multiply engineering power across small teams.

lab_activity.title: How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex to build without limits
lab_activity.summary: How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex with GPT-5.5 to investigate hard-to-reproduce issues, build across platforms, and focus on product outcomes.

lab_activity.title: Measuring the impact of learning with AI in Sierra Leone and beyond
lab_activity.summary: Results from a randomized controlled trial show the potential of Gemini’s Guided Learning feature to boost engagement and accelerate learning.

lab_activity.title: Confidential submission of draft S-1 to the SEC
lab_activity.summary: OpenAI confirms a confidential S-1 submission to the SEC and has not yet determined timing for further action.

lab_activity.title: Data Formulator 0.7: AI-powered data analytics for enterprise data
lab_activity.summary:
Data Formulator introduces AI-powered analytics for enterprise data workflows. Data teams can easily bring enterprise data into an AI-ready workspace where users can explore, analyze, and visualize data with AI agents to turn raw data into actionable insights.
The post Data Formulator 0.7: AI-powered data analytics for enterprise data appeared first on Microsoft Research.

lab_activity.title: Extending Human Intelligence Through AI
lab_activity.summary:
Understanding AI as an extension of human intelligence—not a replacement for it—offers a more grounded path for building trustworthy AI systems.
The post Extending Human Intelligence Through AI appeared first on Microsoft Research.

lab_activity.title: Vega: Zero-knowledge proofs for digital identity in the age of AI
lab_activity.summary:
Vega turns a full credential into a single proof, sharing only what is needed and nothing more, with performance that works in real apps. 
The post Vega: Zero-knowledge proofs for digital identity in the age of AI appeared first on Microsoft Research.

lab_activity.title: MagenticLite, MagenticBrain, Fara1.5: An agentic experience optimized for small models
lab_activity.summary:
MagenticLite is an agentic system for small models that works across the browser and local file system in a single workflow. It combines specialized models and orchestration to support efficient agentic performance on everyday tasks.
The post MagenticLite, MagenticBrain, Fara1.5: An agentic experience optimized for small models appeared first on Microsoft Research.

lab_activity.title: We’re launching the Google DeepMind Accelerator program in Asia Pacific to tackle environmental risks
Fast-tracking genetic leads to reverse cellular aging
lab_activity.summary: Biologists use Co-Scientist to find novel factors that successfully rejuvenate human cells.

lab_activity.title: Making it easier to understand how content was created and edited
lab_activity.summary: We're expanding our tools to help you understand how content was created and edited across the web.

lab_activity.title: Gemini for Science: AI experiments and tools for a new era of discovery
lab_activity.summary: A collection of science tools and experiments to expand the scale and precision of scientific exploration.

lab_activity.title: Introducing Google Antigravity 2.0
Introducing Gemini Omni
Simulate real-world places with Project Genie and Street View
lab_activity.summary: We’re expanding access to Google AI Ultra subscribers globally and introducing a new capability powered by Street View.

lab_activity.title: How WeatherNext helped the National Hurricane Center better predict Hurricane Melissa’s historic landfall in Jamaica
lab_activity.summary: Learn how our WeatherNext AI model help forecasters give communities unprecedented time to prepare ahead of  the historic Hurricane Melissa.

lab_activity.title: Uncovering repurposed medicines to fight liver fibrosis
lab_activity.summary: Stanford geneticist uses Co-Scientist to help find new treatments for chronic liver disease and liver fibrosis.

lab_activity.title: Uniting biological toolkits for a new approach to ALS
lab_activity.summary: Co-Scientist unites Boston Children’s Hospital and MIT’s labs to explore new RNA-based treatments for ALS.

lab_activity.title: Accelerating discovery of liver disease mechanisms
lab_activity.summary: Filippo Menolascina uses Co-Scientist to identify new liver disease treatments and explain why existing drugs only help certain patients.

lab_activity.title: Opening new paths in aging research
lab_activity.summary: Calico Life Sciences uses Co-Scientist to connect scattered findings and generate new leads in aging research.

lab_activity.title: Finding the molecular switches behind new infectious diseases
lab_activity.summary: Clare Bryant uses Co-Scientist to identify genetic triggers in emerging infectious diseases.

lab_activity.title: Strengthening Singapore’s AI Future: A New National Partnership
lab_activity.summary: Google DeepMind and Singapore partner to apply frontier AI to address complex challenges across health, education, and sustainability and more.
